MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Judge Joesph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

James H. Ghilotti, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Michael Belding.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Clutch & Brake Xchange, Inc.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant Clutch & Brake Xchange, Inc, in the amount of:

For Michael Belding:
$81,250.00 in Economic Damages,
$750,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $831,250.00.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
